description: Baseline runtime coverage harness and session files

asi.hypothesis: Measure current saorsa-gossip-runtime line coverage using the required per-crate coverage script before adding tests.
asi.coverage_gap: Need raise from 43.44% to >90%; uncovered modules include rendezvous/coordinator/runtime direct tests.

description: Add runtime coordinator and rendezvous unit tests with mocks

asi.hypothesis: Focused unit tests for mocked coordinator/rendezvous clients will cover untested branches and lift runtime crate line coverage above 90 without production changes.
asi.result: Coverage reached 91.42% with 27 runtime tests passing and clippy checks passing.

description: Add direct runtime config and builder wiring tests

asi.hypothesis: Direct unit tests for runtime config defaults, builder setters, and identity wiring will add coverage above the prior 91.42% while exercising legitimate public/runtime behavior.
asi.result: Coverage improved to 93.00%; runtime tests and clippy checks passed.
asi.commit_note: Previous keep improved coverage but auto-commit was blocked by existing cargo hakari verification; ran cargo hakari generate/manage-deps as the hook requested before this keep.

description: Remove mock-only rendezvous test and add runtime oracle/default-build tests

asi.hypothesis: Address reviewer concerns by removing a mock-only test and reducing flake risk while adding legitimate runtime builder/default identity tests to preserve >90 coverage.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary metric dropped from 93.00 to 92.77, so autoresearch primary-metric rule requires discard even though quality remained acceptable and >90.
asi.next_action_hint: Reapply the flake fix and mock-only test removal together with additional legitimate production behavior tests to exceed the 93.00 best.

description: Add broader legitimate runtime/coordinator/rendezvous tests after review fixes

asi.hypothesis: Reapply reviewer quality fixes and add meaningful coordinator response-filtering/timeout plus runtime default/oracle and rendezvous empty-provider tests to improve beyond the 93.00 best.
asi.result: Coverage improved to 94.04% with 34 runtime tests passing; checks passed.
asi.review_response: Removed mock-only rendezvous test, increased provider validity windows to avoid timing flakes, and added tests around production behavior rather than mocks.

description: Exercise rendezvous background collector with valid and invalid summaries

asi.hypothesis: Driving the real start_collecting_for_target background receive loop with mock PubSub messages will cover meaningful production behavior and improve line coverage.
asi.result: Coverage improved from 94.04% to 94.75%; tests and checks passed.
asi.behavior_covered: Collector subscribes after shard subscription, caches a valid provider summary, and handles invalid payload errors without stopping.

description: Cover context stream limit accessor and runtime oracle build path

asi.hypothesis: Small legitimate tests for the GossipContext stream_read_limit accessor and the runtime builder's peer-health-oracle build branch will cover remaining missed production lines.
asi.result: Coverage improved from 94.75% to 95.18%; tests and clippy checks passed.
asi.behavior_covered: Configured stream read limit accessor and building runtime with a PubSub peer health oracle installed.

description: Baseline current rendezvous coverage after persisted state reinitialization

asi.hypothesis: Reinitialize the experiment to match the persisted rendezvous coverage target and confirm the current committed tests remain above 90% before attempting further legitimate coverage gains.
asi.state_note: autoresearch.md/autoresearch.sh target rendezvous coverage_pct; previous json segment was runtime line_coverage, so a new config header was required.

description: Cover rendezvous byte adapter none and malformed-value behavior

asi.hypothesis: Test-only serde harnesses for the rendezvous byte adapters will legitimately cover optional None serialization/deserialization and malformed non-byte rejection paths without changing production code.
asi.result: Rendezvous coverage improved from 94.37% to 95.73%; package tests, fmt, and clippy checks passed.
asi.behavior_covered: Optional byte fields round-trip explicit None; optional and required byte adapters reject CBOR text values instead of accepting malformed wire data.

description: Try owned byte-buffer deserializer harnesses for rendezvous byte adapters

asi.hypothesis: Custom test-only deserializers that call visit_byte_buf should cover owned-byte-buffer visitor arms for required and optional rendezvous byte adapters.
asi.rollback_reason: Coverage dropped from the prior 95.73% best to 95.08%; the added harness increased measured lines more than covered lines and is too synthetic to keep.
asi.next_action_hint: Avoid large custom deserializer harnesses. Remaining gaps are mostly visitor expecting/SystemTime and sign/verify serialization ? lines; pursue only concise behavior tests with favorable coverage or stop after confirming target is comfortably exceeded.
